title: Woman's body found at her home in Borcherds
description: GEORGE NEWS - A woman's body was found...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - A woman's body was found at her house in Nel Street, Borcherds, on Wednesday morning, 5 February.


> Conville police opened an inquest docket after they attended a scene.


According to Southern Cape police spokesperson Sergeant Chris Spies, the police were called to the scene where they found the body. No further information is available at this stage.

"An autopsy to determine the cause of death was conducted. No foul play is suspected. The report's outcome will be shared with the next of kin of the deceased," he said.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
